violations.text: The doors to the outside, located in the front entrances, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC has door sweeps on site to install. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The automatic dispenser for the 3-bay sink sanitizer was not pulling sanitizer. Establishment has chlorine and test strips for use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
